class.name: ResonanceFMODBridge
class.brief_description: Optional bridge connecting Nexus Resonance (Steam Audio) with FMOD Studio via phonon_fmod plugin.
class.description: When using fmod-gdextension with Nexus Resonance, the bridge loads the Steam Audio FMOD plugin dynamically and passes ResonanceServer's context, HRTF, simulation settings, and reverb source to it. Use resonance_fmod_bridge.gd for GDScript access. See docs/FMOD_BRIDGE.md for setup.

method.name: init_bridge
method.description: Initialize: load plugin and call iplFMODInitialize etc. Requires ResonanceServer initialized. Returns true on success.

method.name: add_fmod_source
method.description: Register Resonance source for FMOD Spatializer. Returns handle for DSP parameter.
